translations.en: a fine looking horse.
translations.zh: 一匹神駿英挺的駿馬。

translations.en: "Hello again!"
translations.zh: 「又見面了！」

translations.en: "Hello, my name is Smith. Who are you?"
translations.zh: 「你好，我叫史密斯。你是誰？」

translations.en: "Oh, I had something important to tell you!"
translations.zh: 「哦，我有件要緊事要告訴你！」

translations.en: "I can't remember what it was, though..."
translations.zh: 「只是……我想不起來是什麼了……」

translations.en: "Oh, that's right, I have a clue for you!"
translations.zh: 「哦，對了，我有條線索要給你！」

translations.en: "You're the Warrior of Destiny, right?"
translations.zh: 「你是命運勇士，對吧？」

translations.en: "Well, when you go to rescue Lord British from the underworld, be sure to bring his sandlewood @box with you!"
translations.zh: 「好吧，當你去地下世界救不列顛王時，別忘了帶上他的檀木@箱子！」

translations.en: "We went to all that trouble just to hear this?" says Dupre.
translations.zh: 杜普雷說：「我們千辛萬苦就是為了聽這個？」

translations.en: "We rescued Lord British from the underworld years ago!"
translations.zh: 「我們幾年前就把不列顛王從地下世界救出來了！」

translations.en: "Well, even if you didn't like my clue, it wouldn't kill you to say 'thank you.'"
translations.zh: 「好吧，就算你不喜歡我的線索，說聲『謝謝』也不難吧。」

translations.en: "You're welcome."
translations.zh: 「不客氣。」

translations.en: "I don't know what it all means; I just know it's important."
translations.zh: 「我不知道那究竟是什麼意思；我只知道很重要。」

translations.en: "It's 'Smith', like in '@blacksmith'.
translations.zh: 「是『史密斯』，就像@鐵匠（blacksmith）一樣。」

translations.en: "They make my @shoes."
translations.zh: 「他們為我打造@蹄鐵。」

translations.en: "They're nailed to my @feet, see?" He holds up a hoof for you to look at.
translations.zh: 「釘在我的@腳上，你看。」他舉起一只蹄子給你看。

translations.en: "You should try it. Saves you from looking for your shoes every morning."
translations.zh: 「你也應該試試。這樣就不用每天早上找鞋子了。」

translations.en: "I eat Iolo's @hay to keep it from piling up everywhere and making a mess."
translations.zh: 「我吃伊歐羅的@乾草，免得它到處堆積、搞得一團亂。」

translations.en: Iolo winks at you. "And a fine job you do of it, too. I don't know what I'd do without you."
translations.zh: 伊歐羅向你眨眨眼。「你做得真好，少了你我不知該怎麼辦。」

translations.en: "Hay is the greatest menace to the well being of Britannia."
translations.zh: 「乾草是不列顛尼亞安康的頭號大患。」

translations.en: "It takes constant vigilance to keep it from engulfing the entire realm."
translations.zh: 「必須時刻警惕，才能防止它淹沒整個王國。」

translations.en: "I've devoted my life to the @task."
translations.zh: 「我將一生奉獻給這項@使命。」

translations.en: "It's a thankless job, but I am a determined horse."
translations.zh: 「這是個費力不討好的差事，但我是匹有志氣的馬。」

translations.en: "Hay, thou hath met thy nemesis, thy doom, and his name is Smith!"
translations.zh: 「嘿，汝已遇見汝的天敵、汝的末日，他的名字叫史密斯！」
translations.note: Hay=Hey 雙關，此處保持幽默語氣

translations.en: "Farewell, two-legger
translations.zh: 「再見，兩腳獸
translations.note: 注意：末尾未完，與下一段拼接

translations.en: You see Iolo give Dupre a nudge in the ribs. "You owe me a drink," he says, grinning.
translations.zh: 你看見伊歐羅用肘推了推杜普雷的肋骨。「你欠我一杯，」他笑嘻嘻地說。

translations.en: He turns to you. "Sir Know-it-all here bet me that there was no such thing as a talking horse!"
translations.zh: 他轉向你。「這位萬事通大人賭我，說世上根本沒有會說話的馬！」

translations.en: "Now I've seen everything. I suppose we'll be inviting some ducks over for tea next."
translations.zh: 「現在我什麼都見識過了。我想下次我們大概要邀幾隻鴨子來喝茶了。」

translations.en: "I don't have the answer to everything. I'm just a horse, you know."
translations.zh: 「我不是什麼都知道的。我只是一匹馬，你懂的。」

translator_notes: 史密斯是會說話的馬，性格幽默自嘲。以口語「你/我」為主，配合輕鬆詼諧的語氣。砂木箱（sandlewood box）是劇情關鍵道具。
